entries.trigger: Context stack is unexpectedly empty when switching to $global.
entries.hint: Run /reset to restore the global context.

entries.message: Context switch is not allowed from $from to $to.
entries.trigger: User requests a context that is not reachable from the current context.
entries.hint: Run /context to list reachable targets.

entries.trigger: Requested context name is not implemented.
entries.hint: Run /context and use one listed target.

entries.trigger: Command/expression dispatch occurs while no active context exists.
entries.hint: Run /reset to restore the global context.

entries.message: Command catalog is unavailable, /help output may be incomplete.
entries.trigger: Embedded command catalog failed to initialize.
entries.hint: Rebuild zeri; embedded catalogs must be valid at build time.

entries.message: Context warning forwarded as error output.
entries.trigger: Warning emitted on the error channel without an explicit ZERI code.
entries.hint: Run /help in the current context and retry the command.

entries.message: Typed execution error forwarded as standardized error output.
entries.trigger: An ExecutionError reaches the output handler without a ZERI-prefixed code.
entries.hint: Review the error code and retry with documented syntax.

entries.trigger: /run is invoked inside the editor without an executor instance.
entries.hint: Re-enter the language context and retry /run.

entries.message: /save requires a script name associated with the editor context.
entries.trigger: /save is used in the editor without a bound script name.
entries.hint: Open the editor with /new <name> or /edit <name>.

entries.trigger: /save fails while writing session state.
entries.hint: Verify write permission for the sessions path shown by /status.

entries.trigger: /bug snapshot file generation fails.
entries.hint: Verify project directory file permissions and retry /bug snapshot.

entries.message: Previous session file was corrupted or could not be loaded.
entries.trigger: Engine startup loads corrupted session state.
entries.hint: Run /save to write a fresh session snapshot.

entries.message: Failed to save session on shutdown: <error>.
entries.trigger: Automatic save during engine shutdown fails.
entries.hint: Ensure the sessions path is writable (/status).

entries.trigger: Go TUI fails to create/resolve local storage directories at startup.
entries.hint: Verify write permissions for user data directories.

entries.trigger: Go TUI cannot resolve its own executable path.
entries.hint: Reinstall zeri or launch it from a valid installation directory.

entries.trigger: Unsupported CLI option passed to zeri.
entries.hint: Use supported options: --no-onboarding, --reset-onboarding, --profile-startup, --exit-after-ready.

entries.trigger: zeri-engine is started directly without the IPC pipe argument.
entries.hint: Launch through zeri (TUI) or pass --yuumi-pipe <name> explicitly.

entries.trigger: ! is used without an actual shell command.
entries.hint: Use !<command> (example: !echo hello).

entries.trigger: Meta parser rejects malformed input (for example an unclosed quote).
entries.hint: Fix the syntax and retry.

entries.trigger: Pipe operator | or an unsupported token pattern is detected.
entries.hint: Run /help to see available commands.

entries.trigger: Context switch includes unsupported flags/extra args.
entries.hint: Use $<context> without flags or extra arguments.

entries.trigger: Dispatcher receives an unsupported input type enum.
entries.hint: Run /help to review supported input forms.

entries.trigger: System shell process cannot be started.
entries.hint: Confirm the command exists in PATH and retry.

entries.trigger: System command returns a non-zero exit status.
entries.hint: Inspect command output and fix the failing command.

entries.trigger: Startup diagnostics contain runtime/startup issues.
entries.hint: Fix the reported dependency or runtime configuration.

entries.trigger: System guard reports missing required tools.
entries.hint: Install the missing prerequisites listed below the error.

entries.trigger: Sandbox external process writes to stderr.
entries.hint: Review runtime output and fix target/process configuration.

entries.trigger: zeri-engine exits through the top-level std::exception handler.
entries.hint: Inspect engine logs and rerun the same command to reproduce.

entries.trigger: zeri-engine exits through the top-level catch-all handler.
entries.hint: Inspect engine logs and report the crash signature.

entries.trigger: JS/TS sidecar execution returns stderr content.
entries.hint: Inspect script output and runtime dependencies.

entries.message: JS/TS sidecar launch failed, falling back to one-shot execution.
entries.trigger: JS/TS sidecar process cannot start.
entries.hint: Verify the Bun runtime and bootstrap scripts.

entries.trigger: JS/TS one-shot process writes stderr lines.
entries.hint: Inspect script output and runtime dependencies.

entries.trigger: Lua sidecar execution returns stderr content.
entries.hint: Inspect Lua output and runtime dependencies.

entries.trigger: Lua one-shot process writes stderr lines.
entries.hint: Inspect Lua output and runtime dependencies.

entries.message: Lua sidecar bootstrap not found, falling back to one-shot execution.
entries.trigger: runtime/bootstrap_lua.lua is missing.
entries.hint: Ensure runtime/bootstrap_lua.lua is packaged.

entries.message: Lua sidecar launch failed, falling back to one-shot execution.
entries.trigger: Lua sidecar process cannot start.
entries.hint: Verify the luajit installation and executable path.

entries.trigger: Python one-shot process writes stderr lines.
entries.hint: Inspect Python output and runtime dependencies.

entries.trigger: Python sidecar execution returns stderr content.
entries.hint: Inspect Python output and runtime dependencies.

entries.message: Python sidecar launch failed, falling back to one-shot execution.
entries.trigger: Python sidecar process cannot start.
entries.hint: Verify the Python installation and bootstrap script availability.

entries.trigger: Ruby sidecar execution returns stderr content.
entries.hint: Inspect Ruby output and runtime dependencies.

entries.trigger: Ruby one-shot process writes stderr lines.
entries.hint: Inspect Ruby output and runtime dependencies.

entries.message: Ruby sidecar bootstrap not found, falling back to one-shot execution.
entries.trigger: runtime/bootstrap_ruby.rb is missing.
entries.hint: Ensure runtime/bootstrap_ruby.rb is packaged.

entries.message: Ruby sidecar launch failed, falling back to one-shot execution.
entries.trigger: Ruby sidecar process cannot start.
entries.hint: Verify the Ruby installation and executable path.

entries.trigger: Bubble Tea runtime exits with an error in main.go.
entries.hint: Restart zeri and inspect /runtime-status.

entries.trigger: Yuumi client read loop loses the transport connection.
entries.hint: Restart zeri and verify engine process health.

entries.trigger: Engine bridge cannot bind or initialize the requested pipe transport.
entries.hint: Ensure the pipe name is valid and not already in use, then retry.

entries.trigger: The $ai connectivity check (or a request) cannot reach the configured endpoint.
entries.hint: Run /setup in $ai, start Ollama with 'ollama serve', or set '/set endpoint <url>'.

entries.message: Failed to encode AI request payload.
entries.trigger: The chat request body cannot be serialized to JSON.
entries.hint: Retry; if it persists, report the issue with the prompt used.

entries.trigger: The HTTP request to the AI endpoint cannot be constructed.
entries.hint: Verify the endpoint URL with /setup, then retry.

entries.trigger: The endpoint responds with a non-2xx status (auth, model, or quota issue).
entries.hint: Check the model name and API key with /setup; a 401/403 means the key is wrong or missing.

entries.trigger: The streaming response is cut off before completion.
entries.hint: Check endpoint stability and retry; reduce prompt size if it recurs.
